title: Sanskrit University's first BTech programme to bridge AI and Indian knowledge systems
description: Central Sanskrit University has launched an AICTE-approved BTech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science at its Nashik campus. The course aims to build language technology skills while supporting the digitisation of India's manuscripts and knowledge heritage.
content: Artificial Intelligence is now finding a place alongside one of the world's oldest languages. In a first-of-its-kind initiative, Central Sanskrit University has launched a BTech programme in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science, marking a new ste... [2939 chars]

title: Google Caps Meta's Use of Gemini AI Models, FT Reports
description: Google has placed limits on Meta Platforms Inc.’s use of its Gemini artificial intelligence models because it could not provide as much computing capacity as the social media company wanted, according to the Financial Times.
content:
Google has placed limits on Meta Platforms Inc.’s use of its Gemini artificial intelligence models because it could not provide as much computing capacity as the social media company wanted, according to the Financial Times.

title: Canada sends trade mission to Japan in diversification effort
description: Canada is looking to increase trade with Japan by leveraging its abundant natural resources, as well as its strengths in artificial intelligence and agricultural products.
content:
Canada has sent a large-scale business delegation to Japan, reflecting Ottawa’s push to diversify its trade partnerships amid an increasingly unstable global environment.
“The world has become a turbulent place. Supply chains built over a decade are ... [509 chars]

title: Forget ChatGPT? China's cheaper AI models are quietly taking over enterprise AI, says Jefferies
description: The global artificial intelligence race may be entering a new phase—one where the biggest competitive advantage is no longer superior performance but dramatically lower costs. According to Jefferies, China's latest AI model, GLM-5.2, could become a bigger threat to Western AI leaders than DeepSeek by reshaping the enterprise AI market.
content: The artificial intelligence race may be entering a new phase where the biggest competitive advantage is no longer having the most powerful model, but offering comparable performance at a much lower price. According to Jefferies' latest GREED & FEAR r... [4299 chars]

title: vital for national security and artificial intelligence growth

title: DuckDuckGo AI Tells Users Donald Trump and JD Vance Have Died from Rabies
description: DuckDuckGo's AI search feature has been caught spreading the outrageous claim that President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance both died earlier this month from rabies, in what appears to be a successful campaign by internet pranksters to manipulate artificial intelligence systems using a technique known as "poisoning."
